signals.npcLine: Crypto tides bleeding, market pulse sinking fast.

signals.clueEvent: Unseen sell-off strikes active coins; chaos brews beneath.

signals.npcLine: Fear sensors flicker; traders retreat to safe zones.

signals.worldFeed: Sentiment drops; digital animals skitter in volatile markets.
signals.clueEvent: Fear level spikes quietly; eyes watch for flash crash.

signals.npcLine: Tokens named AI and MON flicker without steady ground.
signals.questPulse: Scattered signals: Blend and Pros chase unstable shadows.
signals.worldFeed: Five unknown cryptos surf distress waves; few hold steady.
signals.clueEvent: Rising rogue assets confuse the network's market trackers.

signals.npcLine: Data decks suggest fractured crypto paths; pick your risk.

signals.npcLine: Quiet whispers urge caution; no safe harbor this night.
signals.questPulse: Watch the blind spots; fear feeds unseen predators here.

signals.clueEvent: Fear’s grip tightens; delicate assets fall into the void.
